content: Chunhui (Kevin) Yao received his PhD from the Centre for Photonic Systems at University of Cambridge in 2024. Prior to that, he completed his Bachelor’s degree at Shanghai Jiao Tong University in 2020. He is currently the Chief Scientist at Glitterintech Limited, while also serving as a Research Associate at the University of Cambridge. His research interests focus on integrated photonic devices and systems for applications in optical sensing, switching, and computing.
summary: Chunhui (Kevin) Yao received his PhD from the Centre for Photonic Systems at University of Cambridge in 2024. Prior to that, he completed his Bachelor’s degree at Shanghai Jiao Tong University in 2020.
title: Chunhui Yao
